prompt.user:
The robot task is to cook an egg. At 00:14, a failure was identified.

[Robot actions and observations before 00:14]
00:01. Action: Move to fridge. Visual observation: fridge (closed). nothing is inside robot gripper.
00:04. Action: Move to fridge. Visual observation: fridge (closed). nothing is inside robot gripper.
00:11. Action: Move to egg. Visual observation: fridge (closed). nothing is inside robot gripper.

[Observation at the end of 00:14]
Action: Pick up egg. Visual observation: fridge (closed). nothing is inside robot gripper.

Q: Infer from [Robot actions and observations before 00:14] or [Observation at the end of 00:14], briefly explain what happened at 00:14 and what caused the failure.
A:

response: At 00:14, the robot attempted to pick up the egg but failed because the egg was not accessible or visible—the fridge was still closed in the observations at 00:01, 00:04, 00:11, and 00:14. The failure was caused by trying to grasp the egg without first opening the fridge.
